case_title: KALPESHKUMAR GOHIL VS. ABDUL AZIZ ALDOSRI ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOHIL, KALPESHKUMAR DBA ADMIRAL HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALDOSRI, ABDUL AZIZ THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 608 O'FARRELL STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109 - UNIT 66, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
